name: c-robot
description: Node.js native addon (C++) for mouse left/right click on macOS

scripts.release:tag: npm run test && node scripts/tag-current.js && npm run pack
scripts.release:patch: npm run test && npm version patch -m "chore(release): v%s" && npm run pack
scripts.release:minor: npm run test && npm version minor -m "chore(release): v%s" && npm run pack
scripts.release:major: npm run test && npm version major -m "chore(release): v%s" && npm run pack
